description: Public opinion in Japan regarding the demand for stricter public health oversight and financial liability for TEPCO following the Fukushima Daiichi nuclear disaster radiation leaks.

key_events.description: Government-appointed panel publishes findings blaming 'collusion' between TEPCO and regulators.
Massive public protests in Tokyo demanding end to nuclear power and TEPCO accountability.
TEPCO is effectively nationalized to handle the ballooning health and compensation costs.

calibration_notes: Useful for calibrating extreme high-consensus scenarios where a disaster causes a near-total shift in public opinion against a corporation.
